instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for physical system data traces",

]

    base:desc "Pressure sensor for physical system data traces",

]

]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool, SimulinkTool, CPlusPlusTool, JavaTool
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards such as SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], and MontiArc [25], [26], where SysML IBDs describe component interfaces and connections, and methodologies like RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT handle complexity across abstraction levels (requirements, functional, logical, product/technical) to ensure interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders [31]."
